recommendations.title: 100 Degrees Below Zero
recommendations.overview: After freak climate and weather events destroy the world around them, a group of rogue scientists attempt to reverse the deadly new ice age.

recommendations.title: Mischief Night
recommendations.overview: Young Emily Walton, who has suffered from psychosomatic blindness ever since the car accident that took her mother's life, must summon every instinct at her disposal to protect herself and her loved ones from a intruder.

recommendations.title: Abraham Lincoln vs. Zombies

recommendations.title: I Spit on Your Grave III: Vengeance Is Mine
recommendations.overview: Jennifer Hills is still tormented by the brutal sexual assault she endured years ago. She’s changed identities and cities, reluctantly joining a support group where she begins to piece together a new life. But when her new friend’s murderer goes free

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Stand and Deliver
recommendations.overview: Jaime Escalante is a mathematics teacher in a school in a hispanic neighbourhood. Convinced that his students have potential, he adopts unconventional teaching methods to try and turn gang members and no-hopers into some of the country's top algebra

recommendations.title: Bugonia
recommendations.overview: Two conspiracy obsessed young men kidnap the high-powered CEO of a major company, convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly
recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.

recommendations.title: Superdeep
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a Russian research team goes below the surface to find out what secret the world's deepest borehole is hiding. On their expedition, something unexpectedly gruesome awaits the researchers.
